understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating the grid, removing breakable blocks with CLICK actions, and using gravity to fall toward the goal after each horizontal move.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is limited to MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT, after which the player automatically falls in the current gravity direction (DOWN in this level, meaning toward smaller y-values, i.e., upward on the screen) until landing on a safe tile, hitting a spike (instant death), or reaching the goal. CLICK actions consume a turn but allow removal of breakable tiles ('x') to open fall paths. UNDO reverses the last action for recovery. Spikes ('u'/'v') end the attempt. Passages in the corridor scan indicate columns where falling leads to a different y-level, helping guide progression.
